Checkpoint A (Tasks 1-5): Values reflection steps — Today's Reflection in Shutdown, Values Check in Weekly Review, keystone context, HANDBOOK updates
Checkpoint B (Tasks 6-11): Domain drift data — `getDomainActivitySummary()` query, wire into weekly review context, `DomainActivityBars` component, HANDBOOK updates
Checkpoint C (Tasks 12-19): Annual review ritual — DB enum, types, definitions, buildSummary, cross-context (refactor `getContextForStep` to array), annual nudge (Dec/Jan), HANDBOOK updates
Add journal feature to CLAUDE.md (Architecture, DB Schema, Current State, Trigger Map)
Update ritual type count from 4 to 5 in two locations
Update DB Schema table count and list (9 → 14, add missing tables)
Add missing directories to Architecture section (journal/, rituals/)
Add ritual enhancements + annual review to Current State
Add `/project-health-check` to monthly maintenance in `~/.claude/maintenance-checklist.md`
T12: Run hookify list, confirm 3 rules enabled with correct event/action/pattern
T13: Verify security-guidance (edit file with `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`, expect warning)
T13: Verify claude-md-management (`/revise-claude-md` proposes diffs)
T13: Verify Neon MCP ("list my Neon projects" returns data)
Run `node scripts/hash-password.mjs` to generate `AUTH_PASSWORD_HASH`
Set `AUTH_PASSWORD_HASH` in `.env.local` and Vercel env vars
Verify hash-based login works, then remove `AUTH_PASSWORD` from `.env.local` and Vercel
Add defensive try/catch to `getDocumentHubData()` query (same pattern as journal queries in PR #17) — prevents crash if documents tables are missing
Push unsubscribe: add indexed `endpoint` column to `push_subscriptions` on next schema change (avoids select-all + JS filter)

Pre-existing build failure: `@uiw/react-md-editor` missing — documents feature (PR #18) dependency not installed. Run `npm install @uiw/react-md-editor` or remove the documents components if the feature is unwanted.
Explore built-in insights system (`/insights`) — could replace manual learnings pipeline
Compress "Current State" in project CLAUDE.md to capabilities summary (~850 tokens)
Prune resolved Open Questions (#3, #8) (~100 tokens)
Graduate memory context-management narrative to pointer (~300-500 tokens)
Remove 2 redundant lines from Global CLAUDE.md (L8, L14) (~20 tokens)
Review and refine the Proof expansion doc with updated priorities based on actual usage: https://www.proofeditor.ai/d/c1y9slwc?token=f91d28ec-8f18-462a-a03a-1b1f927fbe8e
Checkpoint A (Tasks 1-5): Query layer — types, date utilities, 8 aggregate queries, `getReportData()` aggregator
Checkpoint B (Tasks 6-11): Reports page UI — stat cards, horizontal bars, progress rings, date picker, 8 report sections, Settings link, revalidation, deploy
Phase 2: Ritual integration (Weekly/Quarterly Review data summaries)
Phase 3: Contextual slices (mini stats on Today, Rituals, Read pages)
Phase 4: Trends & streaks (period-over-period, streak tracking — needs proper TZ handling, see Open Question #11)
Phase 5: AI insights (Haiku natural language observations)
